startPoint.en: Talk to Maggie the witch at her caravan, north of Draynor Village, west of the Draynor lodestone.
startPoint.es: Habla con Maggie the witch en su caravana, al norte de Draynor Village, al oeste del lodestone de Draynor.

rewards.display: 2 quest points (or 1 quest point; depending on whether you had completed Witch's Potion/Sheep Shearer before they got demoted to a miniquest)
10 portions of experience-giving goulash, and a bowl to collect it with (each drink gives experience equal to ten times the corresponding skill level, or five times if used for Invention)

postQuest.display: With the indicated minimum Magic level (boostable), talking to Maysa the Hag, Netty, Baba Yaga, and Kardia will give a one-time Magic experience bonus when the broomstick is wielded. Maysa the Hag: 1,997 Magic experience (requiring level 33 Magic) Netty: 7,139 Magic experience (requiring level 53 Magic) Baba Yaga: 10,338 Magic experience (requiring level 73 Magic, partial completion of Lunar Diplomacy) Kardia: 14,979 Magic experience (requiring level 93 Magic, partial completion of Underground Pass)

text.en: Talk to Maggie who is located just west of the Draynor lodestone.
text.es: Habla con Maggie, que se encuentra justo al oeste del lodestone de Draynor.

chatOptions: 1 Is there any way I could help?
1 Sure, I can do that for you.

text.en: Talk to Betty in furthest north-western house in Port Sarim.
text.es: Habla con Betty en la casa más al noroeste de Port Sarim.

chatOptions: 1 Talk to Betty about Swept Away.

text.en: Enter the trapdoor in the south-east corner of the house.
text.es: Entra por la trampilla en la esquina sureste de la casa.

text.en: Talk to Lottie.
text.es: Habla con Lottie.

chatOptions: 2 I need to retrieve Betty's wand.

text.en: Complete the puzzle.
text.es: Completa el puzle.

text.en: Put the blackbird in the holding pen.
text.es: Pon el mirlo en el corral de retención.

text.en: Put the rat in the blackbird pen.
text.es: Pon la rata en el corral de los mirlos.

text.en: Put the spider in the spiders pen.
text.es: Pon la araña en el corral de las arañas.

text.en: Put the lizard in the reptiles pen.
text.es: Pon el lagarto en el corral de los reptiles.

text.en: Put the rat in the rat pen.
text.es: Pon la rata en el corral de las ratas.

text.en: Put the blackbird in the blackbird pen.
text.es: Pon el mirlo en el corral de los mirlos.

text.en: Open and search the chest near the ladder you came from.
text.es: Abre y registra el cofre cerca de la escalera por la que viniste.

text.en: Climb up the ladder and talk to Betty.
text.es: Sube por la escalera y habla con Betty.

chatOptions: 1 Talk to Betty about Swept Away.

text.en: Head to Rimmington (run southwest from Betty's shop in Port Sarim).
text.es: Dirígete a Rimmington (corre hacia el suroeste desde la tienda de Betty en Port Sarim).

text.en: Talk to Hetty.
text.es: Habla con Hetty.

text.en: Enter the trapdoor just south of her house.
text.es: Entra por la trampilla justo al sur de su casa.

text.en: Talk to Gus.
text.es: Habla con Gus.

text.en: Take from the crate that's labelled "Newts and Toads".
text.es: Coge algo de la caja etiquetada como "Newts and Toads".

text.en: Place the label of the creature you removed on that box.
text.es: Coloca la etiqueta de la criatura que quitaste en esa caja.

text.en: If you placed the "Newts" label previously, place the "Toads" label on the "Newts" crate. Otherwise place the "Newts" label on the "Toads" crate.
text.es: Si colocaste antes la etiqueta "Newts", coloca la etiqueta "Toads" en la caja de "Newts". Si no, coloca la etiqueta "Newts" en la caja de "Toads".

text.en: Place the remaining label on the last box and talk to Gus.
text.es: Coloca la etiqueta restante en la última caja y habla con Gus.

text.en: Take a newt from the newt crate.
text.es: Coge un tritón de la caja de tritones.

text.en: Talk to Hetty.
text.es: Habla con Hetty.

text.en: Use the ointment on the broom.
text.es: Usa el ungüento en la escoba.

text.en: Talk to Aggie in Draynor Village. You will get teleported to a new area.
text.es: Habla con Aggie en Draynor Village. Serás teletransportado a una nueva zona.

chatOptions: 1 Yes, I'm ready to go now.

text.en: Talk to Aggie again.
text.es: Habla de nuevo con Aggie.

text.en: Complete the puzzle.
text.es: Completa el puzle.

text.en: Talk to Aggie
text.es: Habla con Aggie

chatOptions: 3 I'd like to go back to Draynor, please.

text.en: Talk to Maggie.
text.es: Habla con Maggie.

chatOptions: 1 I have good news for you.

text.en: Stir the cauldron with the broomstick.
text.es: Remueve el caldero con el palo de escoba.

text.en: Talk to Maggie.
text.es: Habla con Maggie.

chatOptions: 1 I've stirred the cauldron for you.

text.en: Quest complete!
text.es: ¡Misión completada!

text.en: If drinking the Goulash after the quest, you may want to disable the setting that destroys empty bowls when eating.
text.es: Si bebes el Goulash después de la misión, quizá quieras desactivar la opción que destruye los cuencos vacíos al comer.
